title: A Scandal in Bohemia
creator: Arthur Conan Doyle
license: Public domain (text: Project Gutenberg #1661 / audio: LibriVox)
description: The first story in *The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes*. Holmes is hired by the King of Bohemia to recover compromising letters from the only person ever to outwit him — Irene Adler. Short, dialogue-rich, ideal for showcasing the per-speaker visual system.
